title: airpure PET Proud Carpet Freshener 500g, Odour Eliminator, Flowers Fragrance, White
features: PET ODOUR ELIMINATOR - Remove the toughest pet odours with this specially formulated carpet powder that uses natural enzymes to eat odours and proteins that bad bacteria live on, leaving a fresh scent. Use on carpets, rugs, and pet beds.
FRESHENS CARPETS & RUGS - Use this enzymatic cleaner for dog urine and other unpleasant pet odours to freshen carpets, rugs, pet beds and car interiors or anywhere your pet resides.

100% VEGAN & CRUELTY FREE - As with the other Airpure fragrance products, this fabric spray is made without using any animal products, by-products or their derivatives for a completely cruel-free product.
MADE IN BRITAIN - We’re proud to say that Airpure Pet Proud Carpet Freshener is a British-made product that meets the highest standards and helps support the economy of our country.
100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE - If you’re not entirely pleased with your purchase, we’ll gladly provide a replacement or refund.
description: Product Description "DECORATE THE AIR As part of the Airpure family of products, AIRPURE Pet Proud Carpet Freshener offers this high-quality enzymatic carpet freshener at an exceptional value. It eliminates smelly pet odours, including dog and cat urine, replacing them with a fresh clean scent. Decorate the air in every room of your home where your pets live on carpets, rugs, upholstery and pet beds as well as your car’s interior. " Ingredients Carpet Freshener
